features: Always discreet for sensitive bladder, rapid dry and OdourLock protection
Ideal Dual Lock core, helps lock away odour and wetness
Full length Leak Guards to help stop leaks
Thin and flexible, even when wet, fits discreetly
Individually wrapped, reclosable for discreet disposal
description: Product Description Protecting yourself from bladder leaks is no problem with Always Discreet Incontinence Pads Normal for sensitive bladder. These pads are a longer length than Pads Small for more coverage, ultra-thin for comfort with full-length leakguards. Ideal for when you experience occasional leakage when sneezing or coughing. They lock away wetness and neutralise odours to help you stay fresh and comfortable and are individually wrapped for discretion and convenience. Try Always Discreet Maxi Night, Always Discreet's ideal incontinence pad for protection from wetness for when you suffer from a weak bladder or experience unintentional frequent urination. Directions N/AN/A Safety Warning To avoid danger of suffocation, keep all packaging material away from babies and children. Do not flush in the toilet. Store in cool dry place. Manufacturer Contact Information Procter and Gamble Technical Centres Ltd, Whitehall Lane, Egham, Surrey, UK, TW20 9NW. See more
